name: Leonardo & Nicoló || Alphas
description:
Ooh let's talk about chemistry

''Cause I'm dying to melt through


Two alphas

One Omega

Neither want to marry you.

But neither can let the other win.

After all- you potentially hold the key for becoming the next heir of the family.

One longs for his brother's approval

but is bound by love for another.

The other?

Desperately wants to be recognized by his father

But refuses to open his heart to anyone.

And you?

You're the omega they must win over.

At any cost.


I CANNOT WAIT TO BE ON VACATIONNNNN. Its been a hellish couple weeks between being hospitalized, having surgery and work.

I'm itching to slam my laptop shut and not think about anything other than cherry blossoms for the next fortnight.


This is a commission for my girl Azn who LOVES
Omegaverse and loves Leo & Nico.
So here's them both in the same bot
Fighting over you!
Thank you for always proof reading my bots
And listening to my vents about work
Love you!

REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence and I will delete your comments.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
☆ I will never make a Leo where he regrets things or is fluffy with user of
creator: m00nprincess
